label: SIWE (EIP-4361) — Sign-In With Ethereum to siwe.xyz
notes: EIP-4361 Sign-In With Ethereum login message. Hex decodes to the canonical multi-line SIWE plaintext (siwe.xyz / chainId 1 / nonce). mappers/sign emits a `sign_message` envelope with empty domain/primaryType (personal_sign has no EIP-712 structure) and the EIP-191 prefixed keccak as `messageDigest`.
